prompt:
I have various features, the most notable of which are:
- YouTube video download commands in MP3 and MP4 format. Use .ytmp3 and .ytmp4. For various video download commands, type .downloadmenu.
- Easily convert a photo into a sticker. Send me a photo with .s or .sticker in the caption, and I can make it into a sticker for you.
- View all my features by typing .allmenu.

I have a wide range of features available. You can claim the 💎 limits every 24 hours using the command .limit. VIP Members can claim a limit of 1500💎 and 2000🪙 coins at once, while non-VIP Members can claim 500💎 and 999🪙 coins.

The 🪙 coin is used in FunGame activities such as Gamble and Spin, and also to purchase a limit 💎. Use the command .buylimit to buy a limit. Coins can be transferred to others using the .transfer command, specifying the amount and mentioning the recipient. For example: .transfer 100 @user.

You can also transfer limit 💎 using the command .glimit. For example: .glimit 100 @user.

To check your limit 💎 and coin 🪙, use the command .myinfo.

👑 WhatsApp Bot Mizo VIP Membership Guidelines!!
